aionima.name: Chrome DevTools
aionima.description: Chrome DevTools for Agents (chrome-devtools-mcp from ChromeDevTools/chrome-devtools-mcp). Provides agent tools for recording performance traces, inspecting network requests, taking screenshots, reading console messages with source-mapped stack traces, and automating Chrome via Puppeteer. Surfaces in the per-project MCP-tab dropdown via the s127 t489 template registry.
